title: feat(voice): add Camb AI TTS integration
summary: New @mastra/voice-camb package adding Camb AI text-to-speech integration. Adds a complete voice/camb directory with CambVoice class extending MastraVoice, supporting mars-flash/mars-pro/mars-instruct models, 140+ languages, 100+ voices, configurable output formats (wav/flac/adts/pcm_s16le), and style control via userInstructions. Includes 10 unit tests, WAV header utility, changeset with code example, and standard build config (tsup/vitest/tsconfig). Author appears to be from Camb AI (vendor contribution). No documentation pages added for the new package.
maintainerNotes: Well-structured community contribution from a Camb AI employee following existing voice package conventions (package.json, tsup config, tsconfig, vitest config all match patterns from other voice/ packages). CodeRabbit flagged two actionable items: (1) parseInt on speaker ID may produce NaN for non-numeric strings—needs validation/fallback, and (2) changeset entry could include a more complete code example (already addressed in latest version). CI checks are stuck in PENDING state since Feb 9—likely need a maintainer to authorize the workflow run for this external contributor's fork. No documentation pages were added (AGENTS.md requires doc updates with code changes). The tests require a real CAMB_API_KEY env var (integration tests, not mocked). Vercel deploys failed due to authorization requirements for external forks (expected). No merge conflicts.
